name: Bhu Master
meta_title: Case Study: Bhu Master | Real Estate & Construction Marketplace
meta_desc: How Trai Inc built a unified property listing, professional network, and material sourcing platform for India's real estate market.

hero.title: One app for every step of buying, building, and selling property
hero.subtitle: Bhu Master needed a single platform to unify property listings, professional networking, and material sourcing for India's real estate and construction market.

introduction.text: Bhu Master set out to give India's real estate and construction market a single, unified digital home — for browsing properties, finding professionals, and sourcing materials. Buyers, sellers, architects, and contractors all needed one place to connect, transact, and grow.

challenge.text: Property buyers, sellers, and builders were relying on fragmented tools — one app for listings, another for finding contractors, manual calls for material sourcing. There was no single platform that connected property discovery, professional networking, and material procurement. The lack of a unified experience led to missed opportunities, slow transactions, and poor trust signals across the ecosystem.

solution.text: We built a unified marketplace from the ground up with three core modules: Property Discovery — search, filter, and browse verified listings for apartments, plots, and commercial spaces. Professional Network — connect with architects, engineers, interior designers, and legal advisors all in one place. Material Sourcing — post material requirements and get competitive quotes from vendors directly in the app. The platform also includes built-in tools like a loan calculator and unit converter to help users make faster decisions.

results.text: Bhu Master is now live on both the Google Play Store and App Store, giving property buyers, sellers, and construction professionals a single platform to manage their entire journey. The app serves the Indian real estate market with verified listings and a growing network of construction professionals and material vendors.
